terms.metaTitle: Terms of Service — Usage Agreement | LessonCraftStudio
terms.metaDescription: Review LessonCraftStudio terms of service. Covers usage rights for free generators, one-time purchases, license key activation, and commercial rights under Swedish law.
terms.title: Terms of Service

acceptance.title: 1. ACCEPTANCE
acceptance.content: By accessing LessonCraftStudio, you agree to these terms. If you disagree, do not use our service.

serviceDescription.title: 2. SERVICE DESCRIPTION
serviceDescription.content: LessonCraftStudio provides professional worksheet and puzzle generator tools. All generators are free to use with a watermark. Paid products (one-time purchases) remove the watermark and include full commercial rights. Paid products are activated with a license key delivered to your email after purchase.

userAccounts.title: 3. USER ACCOUNTS
userAccounts.accurate: Valid email address for license key delivery
userAccounts.security: Maintain security of your license key — do not share it
userAccounts.responsible: Responsibility for all activity under your license

paymentTerms.title: 4. PAYMENT TERMS
paymentTerms.pricing: Pricing displayed on our sales pages at time of purchase
paymentTerms.billing: One-time payment — no recurring charges or subscriptions
paymentTerms.changes: Prices may change; your purchase price is locked in permanently

acceptableUse.title: 5. ACCEPTABLE USE
acceptableUse.illegal: Illegal activities or content that violates applicable laws
acceptableUse.system: Attempts to reverse engineer, hack, or interfere with the platform
acceptableUse.resale: Sharing, transferring, or reselling your license key

intellectualProperty.title: 6. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
intellectualProperty.content: The platform, generators, source code, and image library remain our property. Content you create using our generators belongs to you. Commercial distribution rights are granted to paid license holders per the License Terms.

termination.title: 7. TERMINATION
termination.user: Your license is permanent for the product(s) you purchased
termination.company: We may revoke a license for violations of these terms with 30 days written notice
termination.effect: Content created before termination remains licensed for continued use and sale

disclaimers.title: 8. DISCLAIMERS
disclaimers.asis: Service provided AS IS without warranties of any kind
disclaimers.availability: No guarantee of continuous or uninterrupted availability
disclaimers.suitability: No warranty of fitness for a particular purpose
disclaimers.content: You are responsible for the accuracy and legality of content you create

limitationLiability.title: 9. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
limitationLiability.content: Maximum liability is limited to the total amount paid for your purchase. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages.

indemnification.title: 10. INDEMNIFICATION
indemnification.content: You indemnify us against claims arising from your use of the platform, content you create, or violations of these terms.

governingLaw.title: 11. GOVERNING LAW
governingLaw.content: Governed by Swedish law. Stockholm district courts have jurisdiction. EU consumer rights preserved.

changes.title: 12. CHANGES
changes.content: We may modify these terms with 30 days notice via email or website announcement. Continued use constitutes acceptance.

license.metaTitle: License Terms — Content Usage Rights | LessonCraftStudio
license.metaDescription: LessonCraftStudio license terms. Free generators with watermark for personal use. Paid products include full commercial, POD, and resale rights.
license.title: License Terms

grantOfLicense.title: 1. GRANT OF LICENSE
grantOfLicense.intro: LessonCraftStudio grants you a license to use its worksheet generators and generated content based on your purchase:
grantOfLicense.freeTier: Free Use: All generators are free to use with a watermark. Output is for personal, non-commercial use only.
grantOfLicense.coreBundle: Paid Products (One-Time Purchase): Full commercial rights. Create unlimited content and sell on any platform — Etsy, Amazon KDP, Teachers Pay Teachers, or your own store. No attribution required.
grantOfLicense.fullAccess: License Key Activation: Paid products are activated with a license key tied to the email address used at purchase. Each license key is for one user.

intellectualProperty.title: 2. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
intellectualProperty.intro: You own the worksheets and content you create using our generators. We retain rights to the platform, software, source code, and image library. Generated content is licensed per Section 1.

restrictions.title: 3. RESTRICTIONS
restrictions.reverseEngineer: Reverse engineer, decompile, or extract source code from the platform
restrictions.competing: Create competing worksheet generator services using our platform or assets
restrictions.sublicense: Share, transfer, or resell your license key to another person
restrictions.removeNotices: Remove or circumvent watermarks on free-tier output
restrictions.illegal: Use generated content for illegal, harmful, or misleading purposes

commercialDistribution.title: 4. COMMERCIAL DISTRIBUTION
commercialDistribution.pod: Print-on-Demand Rights: Paid license holders may sell unlimited copies of generated content through print-on-demand platforms (Amazon KDP, Lulu, IngramSpark, etc.).
commercialDistribution.digital: Digital Distribution: Paid license holders may sell digital downloads of generated content on any platform (Etsy, Gumroad, Teachers Pay Teachers, personal websites, etc.). No royalties or attribution required.

termination.title: 5. TERMINATION
termination.content: We may terminate your license for breach of these terms with 30 days written notice. Content created before termination remains licensed for continued use and sale.

warrantyDisclaimer.title: 6. WARRANTY DISCLAIMER
warrantyDisclaimer.content: The service is provided "AS IS" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee fitness for a specific purpose, uninterrupted availability, or error-free operation.

limitationOfLiability.title: 7. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
limitationOfLiability.content: Maximum liability is limited to the total amount paid for your purchase. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

governingLaw.title: 8. GOVERNING LAW
governingLaw.content: Governed by Swedish law. Disputes shall be resolved in Stockholm district courts.

modifications.title: 9. MODIFICATIONS
modifications.content: We may modify these terms with 30 days notice via email or website announcement. Continued use of the platform after notice constitutes acceptance.

privacy.metaTitle: Privacy Policy — Data Practices & GDPR | LessonCraftStudio
privacy.metaDescription: Read our privacy policy. Learn how LessonCraftStudio handles your data under GDPR and Swedish law. We collect minimal data and never sell personal information.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

introduction.title: 1. INTRODUCTION
introduction.content: This policy explains how LessonCraftStudio collects, uses, and protects your personal data. We operate under GDPR and Swedish data protection law. We collect minimal data and never sell your personal information.

dataCollection.title: 3. DATA COLLECTED
dataCollection.personal: Purchase data (email address, name) — provided when you buy a product via WarriorPlus
dataCollection.usage: Usage analytics (pages visited, generators used, session duration)
dataCollection.technical: Technical data (IP address, browser type, device information)

legalBasis.title: 4. LEGAL BASIS
legalBasis.contract: Contract performance (license key delivery, product access)

dataUsage.title: 5. DATA USE
dataUsage.service: Delivering license keys and product access after purchase
dataUsage.communication: Transactional emails (purchase confirmation, license key delivery)

dataSharing.title: 6. DATA SHARING
dataSharing.payment: PayPal and Stripe (payment processing via WarriorPlus)
dataSharing.legal: Legal authorities when required by law
dataSharing.consent: Third parties only with your explicit consent

dataRetention.title: 7. DATA RETENTION
dataRetention.content: Purchase records and license data: retained for the lifetime of your license. Server logs: 90 days. Analytics data: 26 months. Marketing preferences: until you opt out.

userRights.title: 8. YOUR RIGHTS
userRights.intro: Under GDPR, you have the right to:
userRights.access: Access your personal data we hold
userRights.restriction: Restrict how we process your data
userRights.portability: Receive your data in a portable format
userRights.objection: Object to processing based on legitimate interests
userRights.complaint: Lodge a complaint with the Swedish Authority for Privacy Protection (IMY)

dataSecurity.title: 9. SECURITY
dataSecurity.content: We use industry-standard security measures including HTTPS encryption, secure database storage, access controls, and regular security reviews. License keys are stored with encryption at rest.

cookies.title: 10. COOKIES
cookies.essential: Essential cookies (language preference, session management) — required for the site to function
cookies.functional: Functional cookies (locale selection, preferred language) — improve your experience
cookies.analytics: Analytics cookies (anonymous usage data) — only with your consent

children.title: 11. CHILDREN
children.content: Our service is designed for adult entrepreneurs, educators, and publishers. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone under 16 years of age. Our generators create content intended for children but are operated by adults.

international.title: 12. INTERNATIONAL TRANSFERS
international.content: Data is primarily stored in the EU/EEA. When data is transferred outside the EU (e.g., to WarriorPlus in the US), appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses are in place.

changes.title: 13. POLICY CHANGES
changes.content: We may update this policy with 30 days notice via email or website announcement. The effective date at the top of this page indicates the last revision. Continued use constitutes acceptance.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know about LessonCraftStudio worksheet generators

items.general: [{"question":"What is LessonCraftStudio?","answer":"LessonCraftStudio is a professional platform with 33 worksheet and puzzle generators for entrepreneurs, Etsy sellers, Amazon KDP publishers, and educators. All generators are free to use with a watermark — no signup required. Paid products remove the watermark and include full commercial rights."},{"question":"Who is LessonCraftStudio for?","answer":"Our platform is designed for Etsy sellers, Amazon KDP publishers, Teachers Pay Teachers creators, homeschool parents, and anyone who wants to create and sell professional printable content."},{"question":"Do I need design skills to use the generators?","answer":"No! Our generators are designed to be user-friendly. Simply choose your settings, pick a theme, and generate professional worksheets in minutes."},{"question":"Can I try before I buy?","answer":"Yes! All 33 generators are completely free to use — no signup or credit card required. Free output includes a small watermark. Purchase a product to remove the watermark and unlock full commercial rights."}]
items.apps: [{"question":"How many worksheet generators do you offer?","answer":"We offer 33 different worksheet generators covering math, language arts, puzzles, games, visual perception, fine motor skills, and more. All generators are free to use with a watermark."},{"question":"What can I do for free?","answer":"All 33 generators are free to use — no signup required. Free output includes a small watermark and is for personal, non-commercial use only."},{"question":"What do I get when I purchase a product?","answer":"Paid products are one-time purchases (no subscription). You get watermark-free output, full commercial rights to sell on any platform, and a license key for instant activation."},{"question":"How many image themes are available?","answer":"We offer 104 themed image collections with 3,000+ images. The base product includes 10 themes; the Complete Image Library unlocks all 104."},{"question":"Can I create worksheets in multiple languages?","answer":"Yes! Our platform supports 11 languages: English, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, Dutch, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, and Finnish."},{"question":"Can I customize the worksheets?","answer":"Absolutely! Each generator offers customization options including difficulty levels, grid sizes, number of items, color schemes, fonts, and more."}]
items.pricing: [{"question":"How much do your products cost?","answer":"All generators are free to use with a watermark. Paid products are one-time purchases starting at $27 — no subscriptions, no recurring fees."},{"question":"Is this a subscription?","answer":"No. All products are one-time purchases. Pay once, use forever. No monthly fees, no annual renewals, no hidden charges."},{"question":"What payment methods do you accept?","answer":"Payments are processed securely through WarriorPlus, which supports all major credit cards and PayPal."},{"question":"Do you offer a money-back guarantee?","answer":"Yes! All products come with a 30-day money-back guarantee. No questions asked."},{"question":"How do I access my purchase?","answer":"After purchase, you receive a license key via email. Enter it at lessoncraftstudio.com/member to activate your products instantly."},{"question":"Can I upgrade later?","answer":"Yes. You can purchase additional products at any time. The best prices are available right after your initial purchase."}]
items.technical: [{"question":"What file formats can I export?","answer":"All generators export to high-quality 300 DPI PDF and JPEG formats, perfect for printing, Amazon KDP, Etsy digital downloads, or Teachers Pay Teachers listings."},{"question":"Do the generators work on mobile devices?","answer":"Yes! Our generators are fully responsive and work on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices through your web browser."},{"question":"Do I need to install any software?","answer":"No installation required! LessonCraftStudio is entirely web-based. No account needed to use the free generators."},{"question":"Are my worksheets saved?","answer":"Worksheets are generated on demand — download them immediately after creation. We recommend saving your files to your device or cloud storage."},{"question":"What if I encounter a bug or issue?","answer":"Contact our support team at support@lessoncraftstudio.com. We respond within 24–48 hours."},{"question":"Are there any usage limits?","answer":"No! Create unlimited worksheets. There are no daily or monthly generation limits."}]
items.commercial: [{"question":"Can I sell the worksheets I create?","answer":"Yes — with any paid product. All paid products include full commercial rights. Sell on Etsy, Amazon KDP, Teachers Pay Teachers, or any other platform. No attribution required."},{"question":"Can I sell worksheets created with the free generators?","answer":"No. Free generator output includes a watermark and is for personal, non-commercial use only. Purchase any paid product to unlock commercial rights."},{"question":"What are POD (Print-on-Demand) rights?","answer":"All paid products include full POD rights. Sell physical printed copies through Amazon KDP, IngramSpark, Lulu, or any print-on-demand service."},{"question":"Can I use the worksheets in my classroom?","answer":"Yes! Both free and paid output can be used in your own classroom or homeschool setting."},{"question":"Do I need to credit LessonCraftStudio on products I sell?","answer":"No attribution is required. Paid products produce clean, watermark-free output with no branding."},{"question":"Can I use the images in other projects?","answer":"The commercial license applies to complete worksheets generated through our platform. Individual image extraction or use outside the generators is not permitted."},{"question":"Is my license permanent?","answer":"Yes. Your one-time purchase gives you a permanent license. Content created retains commercial rights forever."}]

about.metaTitle: About LessonCraftStudio | Professional Printable Creation Tools
about.metaDescription: LessonCraftStudio offers 33 professional worksheet and puzzle generators with 3,000+ themed images in 11 languages. Free to use with watermark. One-time purchase for full commercial rights.
about.metaKeywords: about LessonCraftStudio, worksheet generators, printable creation tools, Etsy printables, Amazon KDP worksheets, puzzle book maker, commercial worksheet generator, multilingual worksheets

hero.title: About LessonCraftStudio
hero.subtitle: Professional printable creation tools for entrepreneurs, educators, and publishers

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: LessonCraftStudio gives you the tools to build a profitable printable business — without design skills, expensive software, or hours of manual work. Our 33 generators produce professional, print-ready worksheets and puzzles in minutes.
mission.description2: Every generator is free to try with a watermark. When you’re ready to sell, a one-time purchase removes the watermark and unlocks full commercial rights — no subscriptions, no recurring fees, no limits on what you create.

instant.title: Instant Generation
instant.description: Pick a theme, customize your settings, and export a print-ready PDF in minutes. No design skills required. Every generator includes automatic formatting, answer keys, and 300 DPI export.

research.title: Professional Quality
research.description: Every generator produces output that meets the standards of Amazon KDP, Etsy, and Teachers Pay Teachers. Print-ready files with proper page sizing, high resolution, and clean formatting.

inclusive.title: 11 Languages, 104 Themes
inclusive.description: Create products for global markets. All generators support 11 languages with automatic translation. Choose from 104 image themes with 3,000+ professionally curated images.

expertise.title: Built for Sellers
expertise.subtitle: Every feature is designed to help you create and sell more products, faster

curriculum.title: Commercial-Ready Output
curriculum.description: 300 DPI PDF export, automatic answer keys, KDP-optimized formatting, and grayscale mode. Your output is ready to list on Etsy, Amazon KDP, or Teachers Pay Teachers immediately.

educators.title: Full Commercial Rights
educators.description: Every paid product includes unrestricted commercial rights. Sell on any platform, in any quantity. No attribution required, no royalties, no restrictions. Your creations are 100% yours to sell.

evidence.title: One-Time Purchase
evidence.description: No subscriptions, no monthly fees, no hidden costs. Pay once and use your generators forever. All products include a 30-day money-back guarantee.

teachers.title: Etsy & KDP Sellers
teachers.description: Build a catalog of printable products fast. Create unique, themed worksheets and puzzle books that stand out in the marketplace. List more products, earn more revenue.

parents.title: Teachers & Parents
parents.description: Create custom worksheets for your classroom or homeschool in seconds. All generators are free to use — perfect for personal educational use.

therapists.title: Content Creators & Publishers
therapists.description: Produce professional printable content at scale. 33 generators, 104 themes, 11 languages — create hundreds of unique products from a single platform.

cta.title: Ready to Create?
cta.subtitle: All 33 generators are free to try — no signup required.
